{{Infobox group
| name = Five Factions Alliance
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Five Factions Alliance Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Five Factions [[Alliance]] is a collection of allied groups that maintains a makeshift encampment at the base of the [[Transcendent Ruins]]. This settlement is characterized by its disorganized appearance, consisting of ramshackle huts, shops, and structures cobbled together from wood and stone. The camp is serviced by a single dirt road used by various animals to pull wagons. While the alliance functions as a unified entity intended to share access to the [[Ruins]], individual groups often compete for strength and territory within it. For example, the [[Sandvipers]] occupy space by seizing ground rather than following a formal plan. The alliance is composed of warriors and [[sacred artists]] who have gathered to seek profit from the dangers found within the [[Ruins]], such as [[dreadbeasts]]. Among its members is the [[Jai clan]], which has defended the area for centuries. Despite internal tensions and competition, leaders have expressed a desire to keep the alliance from fracturing before outsiders arrive.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Five Factions [[Alliance]] is a group that maintains an encampment surrounding the [[Transcendent Ruins]]. This settlement consists of various territories and buildings, including bathhouses and structures cobbled together from fresh planks, all situated amidst blackened trees. While the [[Sandvipers]] occupy certain areas within the alliance, the group is responsible for most construction in the region. The camp serves as a location for mad experiments and houses many [[Soulsmiths]] along with [[Coppers]] older than six years. During the events of the story, [[Yerin]] is present within the camp, which was a site that the [[Arelius Underlord]] would have otherwise taken control of.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] is the name for the encampment surrounding the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] encampment is made of shacks and shops cobbled together from fresh planks.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandvipers]] occupy territory within the [[Five Factions Alliance]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The bathhouses are part of the [[Five Factions Alliance]] encampment.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] is the group that most construction in the area belongs to.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] is the setting where mad experiments occur.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] is surrounded by blackened trees.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] is a group.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] includes various territories and buildings.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] contains many [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] contains [[Coppers]] above the age of six.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Arelius Underlord]] would have taken control of the [[Five Factions Alliance]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is in the [[Five Factions Alliance]] camp.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] has a camp.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] has a ramshackle encampment that formed after the [[Transcendent Ruins]] rose.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Half of the [[Jai clan]] shelters in the [[Five Factions Alliance]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|There are no civilians in the [[Five Factions Alliance]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Five Factions Alliance]] has bystanders.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
